sections.description: A unified, modular workspace platform for any business industry. Supports Real Estate agencies, Photography Studios, and more — all in one plugin with dynamic module switching, industry onboarding, and one-click auto-updates.
sections.changelog:
2.0.1 — Hotfix: Dashboard Update Drawer & AJAX Connection Stabilisation

  • Detailed Release Drawer: Replaced the raw click-to-update trigger with a beautiful, slide-over drawer detailing update benefits and release changelogs.
  • AJAX Timeout Stabilisation: Resolved the infinite buffering bug by shifting to a timeout-aware jQuery.ajax routine with proper error fallback alerts.

2.0.0 — Unified Workspace Platform Milestone

  • Unified Architecture: Merged Cora for Real Estate and Cora for Studio into a single plugin with a modular industry registry. Users select their workspace type during onboarding.
  • Module Registry: Introduced Cora_Module_Registry — a central class that dynamically loads sidebar navigation, roles, CRM stages, and dashboard widgets based on the active industry module.
  • Auto-Updater: Added one-click workspace update system. Admins see a pulsing update button next to the logo.
  • Performance: Transient-based caching for dashboard stats. Lazy loading for GrapesJS and CodeMirror assets.
